task: Implement ADR-007: replace skill-based memory (tiered-memory, hybrid-memory, session-guard) with native OpenClaw config. Apply config.patch to enable memorySearch (SQLite vector, hybrid query, onSessionStart sync, watch, intervalMinutes=30, memoryFlush before compaction, contextPruning). Update AGENTS.md to remove mandatory tiered memory retrieval protocol. Update HEARTBEAT.md to remove session detection + hybrid memory sections. Update SOUL.md to remove manual memory_cli.py instructions. Archive (move to skills/archived/) the tiered-memory, hybrid-memory, session-guard skills. Verify the config works with a session restart test.
